reference: You can give one-fourth of a tablet for fever every six hours if the fever goes over one hundred degrees Fahrenheit. If it is syrup, then you can use five milliliters of syrup every six hours.
text: You can give 1/4 of a tablet for fever every 6 hours if the fever goes over 100°F. If it is syrup, then you can use 5 mL of syrup every 6 hours.
